query: SELECT id, nome, cnpj, status FROM empresas ORDER BY id; SELECT id, nome FROM areas_negocio ORDER BY id; SELECT ae.area_id, ae.empresa_id, e.nome as empresa_nome, a.nome as area_nome FROM area_empresas ae JOIN empresas e ON ae.empresa_id = e.id JOIN areas_negocio a ON ae.area_id = a.id ORDER BY ae.area_id, ae.empresa_id;
